title: hylotelephium angustum var. angustum
intro: Hylotelephium angustum var. angustum, also known as Korean sedum, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Korean sedum include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Korean sedum can be prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
